name: Push-ups
instructions: Start in a plank position with hands shoulder-width apart
Lower your body until your chest nearly touches the floor
Push yourself back up to the starting position

name: Bench Press
instructions: Lie on bench with feet flat on floor
Grip barbell with hands shoulder-width apart
Lower bar to chest with control
Press bar up until arms are fully extended

name: Squats
instructions: Lower your body as if sitting back into a chair
Keep chest up and knees behind toes
Push through heels to return to standing
